title: Blood Drive
postTitle: 🩸 Jazmine’s Journey Blood Drive – In Honor of Jazmine 💛
location: 1st Southern Baptist Church, 851 N Stapley Dr, Mesa, AZ 85203
description: We’re honored to host our 2nd Blood Drive in memory of sweet Jazmine.
Jazmine needed countless blood transfusions. Each one gave her more time.
💉 Be a part of her legacy. Help save lives!
listItems: Wear your Jazmine’s Journey shirt or colors 💛
linkText: Click Here and be a Hero

title: AZ Rattlers Game Fundraiser
location: Desert Diamond Arena, 9400 W Maryland Ave, Glendale, AZ 85305
description: Get ready for an exciting night of football and fun at the Arizona Rattlers vs Northern Arizona Wranglers!
🏈 A portion of ticket sales will be donated to Jazmine's Journey.
Bring your friends and family, enjoy the game, and support our cause!
